brief_summary_anonymized: Tourism development authority needs investment-conference content that goes beyond 'achievements showcase.'
strategic_insight: Tourism development is not extractive. It is narrative. A region irrigated by investment is also a region whose stories find their teller.
execution_summary: Double-meaning Arabic word becomes the campaign's structural key. Visual: land + storyteller intercut. Audience experiences the word before learning its second meaning.
what_made_it_work: Double-meaning Arabic word creates a-ha moment specific to Arabic-speaking audience
Narrative framing (vs transactional) lifts investor sentiment
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires Arabic-language craft that operates on two levels
Only works when both meanings are genuinely true for the brand
